description_long: This is a cylindrical wooden barrel with vertical staves and a flat, circular top and bottom. The exterior is primarily a medium brown wood texture, segmented by subtle vertical lines indicating the staves. A metallic band runs along the top edge, providing structural reinforcement and a slight reflective accent. Around the midsection, there is a rectangular label featuring a red and yellow abstract design, bordered in white, which stands out against the wood. The barrel appears to be hollow and could serve as a container for liquids or dry goods. There are no visible handles or spouts, and the surface finish is matte with a slight sheen from the metal band.
description: A medium brown wooden barrel with a metallic top band and a colorful label around its middle. The surface is segmented by vertical staves and features a flat top and bottom.
description_view_0: Front view showing the colorful red and yellow label prominently on the barrel's midsection.
description_view_1: Side view with the edge of the label visible, revealing more of the plain wooden surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying only the uninterrupted wooden staves and metallic band, with no label visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a partial glimpse of the label, mostly showing the wooden surface.
attribute_labeling_or_markings: rectangular label with red and yellow design bordered in white
